semantics.label: Python Runner
semantics.description: Choose the Python interpreter used for code execution

options.label: Pyodide (full Python 3 support, loaded via CDN)

fields.label: Disable output popups
fields.description: If enabled, program output will only be written to the console and not shown in popup dialogs.

fields.label: Show save and load buttons
fields.description: If enabled, learners can download their code and load it again later using the shared save/load buttons.

fields.label: Enable image uploads
fields.description: If enabled, learners can upload images during runtime and access them in their code.

fields.label: Enable sound uploads
fields.description: If enabled, learners can upload sounds and music during runtime and access them in their code.

fields.label: Execution Limit
fields.description: Maximum number of Python execution steps allowed. Use to prevent infinite loops. [0: No limit]

fields.label: Pyodide-Packages
fields.description: Additional Pyodide packages that should be loaded before execution.

semantics.label: Content
semantics.description: Text can contain text, images, videos and code

fields.label: Type
fields.description: Type of H5P Content

fields.label: Text
fields.description: Write general description as markdown code

fields.label: Solution Code in Spoiler-Tags
fields.description: Solution Code in Spoiler-Tags

fields.label: Image
fields.description: An image

fields.label: Show Editor?
fields.description: Should an editor displayed to the user

fields.label: Code
fields.description: Write general description as markdown code

semantics.label: Editor Settings
semantics.description: This defines how the actual editor is pre-populated and whether code should be executed before or after user input.

fields.label: Instructions
fields.description: Write instructions as markdown code

fields.label: Instructions Image
fields.description: An optional image appended to instructions

fields.label: Pre code
fields.description: Code prepended before main program

fields.label: Default Code
fields.description: Add default code here, so that users can modify this code.

fields.label: Post code
fields.description: Code appended after main program

fields.label: Additional Python Files
fields.description: Additional Python modules that are available through imports when the Pyodide runner is used. Use module file names like helper.py.

fields.label: File Name
fields.description: Python module file name, for example helper.py

fields.label: Show file in editor
fields.description: If enabled, learners can switch to this file in the editor.

fields.label: Learner can edit file
fields.description: If enabled, learners can modify this file in the editor.

semantics.label: Grading Settings
semantics.description: Information how the content should be graded

fields.label: Grading method
fields.description: Grading methods

fields.label: Hidden Testcase
fields.description: Input- and Output values are not shown to user.
